  Details:
  Designed and started the one-call self-serve program-onboarding flow. Documented in PROGRAM_PARTNER_ONBOARDING.md: the consolidated program-definition parameter set, the per-program attestation/admin subdomain step (with clash-check), the integration boundary (partner submits attestation/activity events via our signing tooling; WE auto-mint trees and manually mark SOLD after payment), and the two-step [PROGRAM REGISTRATION] blueprint (REQUEST by anyone → governor APPROVAL via DApp review page + notification bell → provisioning handler) + a public marketing/funnel page. Built the request side: dao_client report_program_registration.py (build_event_cli over the full parameter set) + dao_protocol dispatch routing for [PROGRAM REGISTRATION REQUEST] → Program Registrations PENDING. Remaining (spec'd): DApp request page, governor review page + bell, provisioning handler.
